productCenter.publish.warningHint: Can publish after review if allowed.
productCenter.publish.workbenchHint: Run publish checks, inspect blockers, generate immutable packages, and queue downstream sync events.
productCenter.import.batchDescription: Review product capability import batches and their parsing status.
productCenter.import.description: Parse XLS/XLSX files, preview row issues, and keep every import batch traceable.
productCenter.import.dropFile: Drop an XLS/XLSX file here or click to upload.
productCenter.import.issueDescription: Preview row-level errors and warnings generated by the Excel parser for the selected import batch.
productCenter.import.title: Import Center
productCenter.quote.description: Preview quote totals through the backend pricing engine before exposing published packages to sales.
productCenter.quote.empty: Run a quote preview to view matched pricing rows.
productCenter.quote.resultHint: The amount and matched rows come from the pricing engine, not frontend-only calculation.
productCenter.quote.title: Quote Preview
productCenter.sales.description: Read published product capability packages for sales and quoting. Draft configuration and pricing data is intentionally excluded.
productCenter.sales.bomSummaryHint: Published package contains reusable BOM snapshots for downstream consumers.
productCenter.sales.configSummaryHint: Only published configuration questions, options, and rules are exposed to sales.
productCenter.sales.customerMediaHint: Sales-visible images, manuals, and documents are separated from internal drafts.
productCenter.sales.priceStatusHint: The quote surface reads published pricing snapshots only.
productCenter.sales.quickQuoteHint: Generate a quote from the currently published product capability package.
productCenter.sales.title: Sales Read-only View
productCenter.sales.workbenchHint: Give sales a clean read-only surface backed by immutable published package snapshots.
product.baseAttribute.hasReferences: This attribute is used by material attributes.

product.materialAttribute.codeExists: This attribute already exists for the same material.
product.material.naturalKeyExists: A material with the same name, model, spec, and manufacturer already exists.
product.mediaAsset.hasReferences: This media asset is used by media bindings.
product.mediaBinding.targetExists: This asset is already bound to the same target, usage, and language.

product.publish.approval.notFound: Publish approval record was not found.
product.publish.approval.required: An approved publish approval is required before creating a publish package.
product.publish.approval.submittedOnly: Only submitted approval records can be approved or rejected.
product.reference.inUse: The record is referenced by product capability data.
product.unit.hasReferences: This unit is used by product master data.
productCenter.template.batchPasteTip: Paste tab- or comma-separated rows. This preview helps clean data before importing.
productCenter.template.description: Maintain reusable configuration templates, versions, question groups, questions, options, and rules.
productCenter.template.editorHint: Maintain versions, groups, questions, options, and rules without leaving the editor.
productCenter.template.entryWorkbenchHin: Select a sales product on the left, then maintain questions, answers, component bindings, and evaluation output in one product context.
productCenter.template.noQuestions: No questions for the current product template.
productCenter.template.optionRequired: Option code and Chinese name are required.
productCenter.template.productListHint: Pick a real sales product first. The editor loads its current configuration template version.
productCenter.template.productSearchPlac: Search product, category, type, or sales mode
productCenter.template.questionRequired: Question code and Chinese name are required.
productCenter.template.optionCodePlaceho: Enter or select option codes, such as FABRIC_TYPE:LF
productCenter.template.optionDescription: Maintain selectable answers and component snapshots for configuration questions.
productCenter.template.previewEmpty: Run an evaluation to preview blockers, warnings, and available options.
productCenter.template.question: Questions
productCenter.template.questionDescripti: Maintain configuration questions and customer-visible input controls.
productCenter.template.questionGroupDesc: Maintain logical groups used to organize configuration questions.
productCenter.template.ruleDescription: Maintain compatibility, visibility, required, and warning rules for configuration evaluation.
productCenter.template.title: Configuration Template Workbench
productCenter.template.versionDescriptio: Maintain draft, current, and published versions with snapshot fields.
productCenter.template.workbenchHint: Edit configuration templates with live checks, dealer preview, and compact batch entry.
